# Post-Market Debrief — June 15, 2026

Today was a no-trade day, which means you stayed on the sidelines while your month-to-date drawdown sits at -₹12,861. Sometimes the best trade is the one you don't take, but given your negative MTD position, a zero-activity session feels like missed opportunity rather than discipline. Without any executed trades to analyze, there's no clear picture of what's working in your current setup or what execution issues might be plaguing your entries and exits. Tomorrow, focus on identifying *why* you didn't trade today — was it no setups that met your criteria, hesitation around risk, or something else entirely? This distinction matters because it will tell you whether to adjust your scanning process, your entry rules, or your confidence in your current strategy. The month is still young enough to recover, but that requires active, intentional trading based on a clear plan rather than passive waiting.
